Package org.apache.juneau.http.response

Class BasicHttpResponse

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.response.BasicHttpResponse
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpResponseMessage
Direct Known Subclasses:
Accepted, AlreadyReported, Continue, Created, EarlyHints, Found, IMUsed, MovedPermanently, MultipleChoices, MultiStatus, NoContent, NonAuthoritativeInformation, NotModified, Ok, PartialContent, PermanentRedirect, Processing, ResetContent, SeeOther, SwitchingProtocols, TemporaryRedirect, UseProxy
public class BasicHttpResponse extends Object implements HttpResponseMessage
Base class for concrete HTTP response objects in the org.apache.juneau.http stack.

Holds a status line, an optional body, and an ordered list of headers. Provides classic-style fluent setters that mutate state and return this, plus an setUnmodifiable() latch that locks the instance against further changes.

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructor with no body.

    Constructor with headers and an optional body.
     
    BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, HttpBody body)

    BasicHttpResponse(BasicHttpResponse copyFrom)

  • Constructor Details

    • BasicHttpResponse

      public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine)
      Constructor with no body.
      Parameters:
      statusLine - The status line. Must not be null.

    • BasicHttpResponse

      public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, HttpBody body)
      Constructor with a body.
      Parameters:
      statusLine - The status line. Must not be null.
      body - The response body. May be null.

    • BasicHttpResponse

      public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, String body)
      Constructor with a string body (UTF-8, text/plain).
      Parameters:
      statusLine - The status line. Must not be null.
      body - The response body as a plain-text string. May be null.

    • BasicHttpResponse

      public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, List<HttpHeader> headers, HttpBody body)
      Constructor with headers and an optional body.
      Parameters:
      statusLine - The status line. Must not be null.
      headers - The response headers. Must not be null.
      body - The response body. May be null.

    • BasicHttpResponse

      protected BasicHttpResponse(BasicHttpResponse copyFrom)
      Copy constructor.
      Parameters:
      copyFrom - The instance to copy. Must not be null.

    • getStatusLine

      public HttpStatusLine getStatusLine()
      Description copied from interface: HttpResponseMessage
      Returns the status line of this response.
      Specified by:
      getStatusLine in interface HttpResponseMessage
      Returns:
      The status line. Never null.

    • getHeaders

      public List<HttpHeader> getHeaders()
      Description copied from interface: HttpResponseMessage
      Returns all response headers, in the order they were received.
      Specified by:
      getHeaders in interface HttpResponseMessage
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable list of response headers. Never null.

    • getBody

      public HttpBody getBody()
      Description copied from interface: HttpResponseMessage
      Returns the response body, or null if the response has no body.
      Specified by:
      getBody in interface HttpResponseMessage
      Returns:
      The response body, possibly null.

      Returns the locale associated with this response, if any.

      Returns:
      This object.

      Sets the status code, preserving the existing protocol version and reason phrase.

      value - New status code.
      Returns:
      This object.

      Parameters:
      value - New reason phrase. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

      public BasicHttpResponse setProtocolVersion(HttpProtocolVersion value)
      Sets the protocol version, preserving the existing status code and reason phrase.

      value - New protocol version. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setHeaders

      public BasicHttpResponse setHeaders(List<HttpHeader> values)
      Replaces all headers with the given list.
      Parameters:
      values - New headers. null is treated as an empty list.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setHeaders

      public BasicHttpResponse setHeaders(HttpHeader... values)
      Replaces all headers with the given array.
      Parameters:
      values - New headers. null is treated as an empty array.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setHeader

      public BasicHttpResponse setHeader(HttpHeader value)
      Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
      Parameters:
      value - The header to set. null is ignored.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setHeader

      public BasicHttpResponse setHeader(String name, String value)
      Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
      Parameters:
      name - Header name. Must not be null.
      value - Header value. May be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

      public BasicHttpResponse addHeader(HttpHeader value)
      Appends a header to the end of the header list.
      Parameters:
      value - The header to add. null is ignored.
      Returns:
      This object.

      public BasicHttpResponse setUnmodifiable()
      Latches this instance so that subsequent calls to mutating setters throw IllegalStateException.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • isUnmodifiable

      public boolean isUnmodifiable()
      Returns whether this instance is locked against modification.
      Returns:
      true if setUnmodifiable() has been called.

      protected final void assertModifiable()
      Throws an IllegalStateException if this instance has been marked unmodifiable.

    • withBody

      public BasicHttpResponse withBody(HttpBody value)
      Returns a new instance with the given body replacing the current body.
      Parameters:
      value - The new body. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • withBody

      public BasicHttpResponse withBody(String value)
      Returns a new instance with the given string body replacing the current body.
      Parameters:
      value - The new body as a plain-text string. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • withHeader

      public BasicHttpResponse withHeader(HttpHeader header)
      Returns a new instance with the given header added.
      Parameters:
      header - The header to add. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • withHeader

      public BasicHttpResponse withHeader(String name, String value)
      Returns a new instance with the given header name and value added.
      Parameters:
      name - The header name. Must not be null.
      value - The header value. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.
